subcodes.first_line: Thy mention hath been made in the presence of the Wronged One, and this Most Holy, Most Exalted Tablet hath been revealed in response, through the grace of God, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت نزد مظلوم مذکور و این لوح امنع اقدس در جواب نازل تا بعنایت حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @living waters; water of life
